caption: A person is seen from behind, walking away from the camera down a narrow, paved road that cuts through a dense, foggy forest. The individual is dressed in dark athletic wear, consisting of a dark long-sleeved jacket or sweatshirt and dark shorts. As the person progresses further down the road, they move deeper into the misty environment, where tall, thin trees line both sides of the path. The atmosphere is dim and monochromatic, with a heavy haze obscuring the distance. Between the frames, the person steadily advances forward, becoming smaller in the distance as they recede toward the horizon of the road. There are no other people, objects, or on-screen text visible in the scene.
